bird.name: Grey gull
bird.summary: The grey gull, also known as garuma gull (Leucophaeus modestus), is a medium-sized gull native to South America. Unusual among gulls, it br…

locations.name: 南美洲
locations.summary: 南亚美利加洲（英语：South America），简称南美洲，为七大洲之一，位於西半球南部（或南半球），西臨南太平洋，西面為太平洋板塊及納斯卡板塊。太平洋板塊及納斯卡板塊之間的內營力為張力，衍生了東太平洋海嶺；而納斯卡板塊與南美洲板塊的內…

relations.subject: Grey gull
relations.evidence: |year=2018 |title=Larus modestus |volume=2018 |article-number=e.T22694292A132539083 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2018-2.RLTS.T22694292A132539083.en |access-date=22 February 2025}} | genus = Leucophaeus | species = modestus | authority = (Tschudi, 1843) | synonyms = Larus modestus | range_map = Leucophaeus modestus map.svg }} The grey gull, also known as garuma gull (Leucophaeus modestus), is a medium-sized gull native to South America
